description_long: This is a small, weathered restaurant building with a corrugated green metal roof and a faded, gray concrete exterior. The front features a glass double door beneath a pink-and-white striped awning with Japanese signage, and a small chalkboard sign sits on the sidewalk. A single window with a metal frame is visible on the side, and a utility box and exposed wiring are attached to the wall. The restaurant is set on a concrete base with a short section of road and a wooden utility pole connected by overhead wires. The structure shows signs of age and wear, with peeling paint and rust stains, giving it a rustic, urban character.
description: A small, weathered restaurant with a green corrugated roof, faded concrete walls, a striped awning with Japanese signage, and urban street elements like a utility pole and overhead wires.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green corrugated roof, a single window, utility box, and exposed wiring on the weathered concrete wall.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the glass double door, pink-and-white striped awning with Japanese signage, and a chalkboard sign by the entrance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the window, utility box, and a clear look at the road and utility pole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain, weathered concrete wall with no windows or doors visible.
attribute_signage: A pink-and-white striped awning above the entrance displays Japanese text in bold, dark characters. There is also a small chalkboard sign on the sidewalk near the door.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features a weathered concrete finish with visible stains and peeling paint, giving it a rustic, aged appearance. A corrugated green metal roof overhangs the front, while a striped awning with Japanese signage adds a touch of color and character. The entrance is marked by a glass double door and a small chalkboard sign, with exposed wiring and a utility box contributing to the urban, utilitarian style.
